name: apply_cuts
description: Materialise a trim spec into an encoded H.264 video file — one clip in, one trimmed clip out. The render engine handles final assembly.

input.description: Trim spec JSON (from waveform_trim / rm_fillers / etc.) or raw video file if no cuts are needed

output.description: Encoded H.264 clip with all cuts applied

params.name: input
params.description: Trim spec JSON or video file
